mapper.insert: insert into stock_industry_benchmark( industry, roe_avg, gross_margin_avg, net_margin_avg, revenue_yoy_avg, debt_ratio_avg, sample_count, update_time ) values ( #{industry}, #{roeAvg}, #{grossMarginAvg}, #{netMarginAvg}, #{revenueYoyAvg}, #{debtRatioAvg}, #{sampleCount}, now() ) on duplicate key update roe_avg = values(roe_avg), gross_margin_avg = values(gross_margin_avg), net_margin_avg = values(net_margin_avg), revenue_yoy_avg = values(revenue_yoy_avg), debt_ratio_avg = values(debt_ratio_avg), sample_count = values(sample_count), update_time = now()
mapper.select: select industry, roe_avg as roeAvg, gross_margin_avg as grossMarginAvg, net_margin_avg as netMarginAvg, revenue_yoy_avg as revenueYoyAvg, debt_ratio_avg as debtRatioAvg, sample_count as sampleCount from stock_industry_benchmark where industry = #{industry}

select industry, roe_avg as roeAvg, gross_margin_avg as grossMarginAvg, net_margin_avg as netMarginAvg, revenue_yoy_avg as revenueYoyAvg, debt_ratio_avg as debtRatioAvg, sample_count as sampleCount from stock_industry_benchmark
